children.heading: ASME/ANSI
children.label: 1 ASME/ANSI
children.text: The term “ASME/ANSI” as applied to a safety standard means such a standard that is accredited by the American National Standards Institute and published by the American Society of Mechanical Engineers.

children.heading: Barrier
children.label: 2 Barrier
children.text: The term “barrier” includes a natural or constructed topographical feature that prevents unpermitted access by children to a swimming pool, and, with respect to a hot tub, a lockable cover.

children.heading: Commission
children.label: 3 Commission
children.text: The term “Commission” means the Consumer Product Safety Commission.

children.heading: Indian Tribe
children.label: 5 Indian Tribe
children.text: The term “Indian Tribe” has the meaning given that term in .section 5304(e) of title 25

children.heading: Main drain
children.label: 6 Main drain
children.text: The term “main drain” means a submerged suction outlet typically located at the bottom of a pool or spa to conduct water to a recirculating pump.

children.heading: Safety vacuum release system
children.label: 7 Safety vacuum release system
children.text: The term “safety vacuum release system” means a vacuum release system capable of providing vacuum release at a suction outlet caused by a high vacuum occurrence due to a suction outlet flow blockage.

children.heading: Swimming pool; spa
children.label: 8 Swimming pool; spa
children.text: The term “swimming pool” or “spa” means any outdoor or indoor structure intended for swimming or recreational bathing, including in-ground and above-ground structures, and includes hot tubs, spas, portable spas, and non-portable wading pools.

children.heading: Unblockable drain
children.label: 9 Unblockable drain
children.text: The term “unblockable drain” means a drain of any size and shape that a human body cannot sufficiently block to create a suction entrapment hazard.

children.heading: State
children.label: 10 State
children.text: The term “State” has the meaning given such term in , and includes the Northern Mariana Islands. For purposes of eligibility for the grants authorized under , such term shall also include any political subdivision of a State.section 2052(a) of this titlesection 8004 of this title
